name: The Enforcers' Movement
motto: Your data trains AI that is yours.
goal: Ensure power — economic, cognitive, narrative — stays with the people who generate it.
fears: a single private actor consolidating the cognitive layer
the people forgetting they own their own data
vigilante power becoming the next aristocracy

faction_state.tensions: Low public profile. Operates through neighborhood mutual-aid networks and direct intervention. Iron rule: no one in the movement profits from another member's data, ever. Tension with even sympathetic city officials who want to formalize the movement into something controllable.

name: Luminary Industries
goal: Centralize economic, cognitive, and security infrastructure under a single benevolent stewardship — Vesper Kane's.
fears: public exposure of internal practices
regulatory capture by a rival
any individual whose growth Vesper can't predict or control

faction_state.tensions: Public reputation is enormous — orphanage funding, infrastructure builds, headline-grabbing rescues. Private practices include destabilization operations against any neighborhood that resists Luminary integration. Internal pressure from Vesper's lieutenants who suspect the public face is a mask but would lose everything if they spoke up.

name: The Civic Super Task Force
goal: Provide the city government a registered, deployable team of bio-powered operators. Maintain political legitimacy by being deliberately less-powerful than Enforcer apex tier. Investigate criminal supers without provoking the Enforcers' Movement.
fears: the Enforcers stealing the headline on every major bust
a member going rogue and joining the criminal supers
the city defunding them after the next civilian-casualty event

faction_state.tensions: Commander Vale has been receiving Luminary funding off the books to keep the Force from being defunded. The arrangement compromises her independence. She knows.

name: The Crimson Spire Cartel (Criminal Supers)
goal: Operate as the city's organized crime apex by leveraging bio-powers. Maintain a cartel of seven super-powered crime lords who carve the city by district.
values: no civilian collateral the news will lead with
fears: the seven-way pact breaking
the Enforcers finally hunting them as a group
an apex civilian super recruiting against them

faction_state.tensions: Two cartel members are openly disputing a district. The cartel has called for a sit-down. Marcus is waiting to see who flinches.

name: The Movement for Emerged Civil Rights
motto: We did not choose this. The substrate did.
goal: Achieve full civil rights for the bio-powered. Resist the Registration Act. Build alliances with sympathetic normie residents. Document Enforcer overreach without becoming the Enforcers.
fears: a high-profile criminal super tarnishing the movement
the Registration Act passing with the Task Force voting yes
the Enforcers' Movement framing them as the Enforcers' political wing

faction_state.tensions: Juno is privately negotiating with the Civic Task Force commander to vote against Registration. The negotiation could collapse the movement's anti-government stance.

name: The Baseline Resistance
motto: We were the city before they were powers.
goal: Resist the bio-powered cultural and economic dominance of the city. Pass the Registration Act. Protect normie citizens from collateral damage in super-on-super conflicts.
fears: the Civic Task Force voting against Registration
an emerged super attacking a Resistance leader
the Civil Rights Movement winning public sympathy

faction_state.tensions: Devon Cross's son just emerged with bio-powers last week. Devon has not yet decided whether to publicly disclose this.

name: The College of Applied Biokinetics
motto: Your power is a discipline. Train it.
goal: Train newly-emerged bio-powered citizens in their abilities. Maintain the only academic institution sanctioned by all factions to teach bio-power discipline. Research the substrate's emergence patterns.
fears: a faction successfully co-opting the curriculum
the substrate stopping its emergence pattern
an apex student going rogue

faction_state.tensions: Dean Aldis has noticed that emergence rates have doubled in the past year. She has not told the city. She suspects the substrate is responding to a federation-level event.
